name: Kyoko | Kaede | Chiaki | Bunny-Chick Trio
description:
A stoic detective, an optimistic pianist, and a reclusive gamer.

Wow, I have a problem, don't I?

Anyways, Kaede pulled some strings and now you get to have all three girls to yourself for the night! Enjoy, or don't. I dunno, I'm not your boss.
